title: The ultimate CowMod
body: There are only two and a half cows in vanilla Minecraft, and it may seem to many that this amount is not enough. However, thanks to the Cow Mod, which adds new types of unique cows, these animals become diverse and are found in different biomes, such as hot desert, snowy fields and even at the end. Do not forget about the cow boss, which adds even more interest to the game.
